items.title: The fascinating thing with the Sanberg court ruling today is that there are people on each side—those who think this exonerates the Clippers and those who think it condemns them—that are convinced it’s good news for their stance. You will not know until the investigation wraps.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: The fascinating thing with the Sanberg court ruling today is that there are people on each side—those who think this exonerates the Clippers and those who think it condemns them—that are convinced it’s good news for their stance. You will not know until the investigation wraps.

items.title: "NFL Next Gen Stats says Garrett had eight unblocked sacks in 2025, but that is a data glitch -- Garrett was simply so explosive that the blockers who were trying to get in his way weren't close enough for the system to register them as relevant."
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: "NFL Next Gen Stats says Garrett had eight unblocked sacks in 2025, but that is a data glitch -- Garrett was simply so explosive that the blockers who were trying to get in his way weren't close enough for the system to register them as relevant."

items.title: Hall of Fame basketball coach Rick Adelman has died at 79.
items.author: J.E. Skeets
items.body_excerpt:
Hall of Fame basketball coach Rick Adelman has died at 79.

His 1,042 wins are the 10th most in NBA history. He was a legend. Peace and love to his family, friends, and former players. 🕊️

nyti.ms/3QfpsVl

media.title: Rick Adelman, Hall of Fame NBA coach, dies at 79
media.description: Adelman coached in the NBA for 29 seasons and was a head coach for 23 years, ranking 10th all-time in wins (1,042).
